description: Machine-readable release gate evidence consumed by scripts/release-preflight.js. Mark a gate READY only after copying concrete build IDs, URLs, screenshot paths, or reviewer notes into evidence.

eas-build-artifacts.evidence: No EAS Android/iOS build artifact evidence is recorded.

android-device-audio.evidence: No Android physical-device build/install/audio evidence is recorded.

ios-device-audio.evidence: No iOS physical-device/TestFlight build/install/audio evidence is recorded.

store-records.evidence: No App Store Connect or Google Play Console app record evidence is recorded. AdMob is deferred because real ads are disabled for v1.0.

store-credentials.evidence: No App Store Connect or Google Play submit credential evidence is recorded.

store-policy-questionnaires.evidence: Apple age rating/export compliance/content rights/no-official-affiliation review completed against publishing/app-store-listing.md; Google Play content rating/target audience/ads declaration/no-government-affiliation review completed against publishing/google-play-listing.md, publishing/google-play-data-safety.md, and reports/2026-05-15-v1-ads-deferred.md. Local policy evidence recorded in reports/store-policy-questionnaires/store-policy-questionnaires.json; real ads remain disabled for v1.0 and no real-money gambling or official-government affiliation claims are present.

privacy-review.evidence: No final Apple privacy labels / Google Play Data safety review against the generated binary is recorded. The review must include the Google Mobile Ads SDK test configuration and REAL_ADS_ENABLED_FOR_V1=false posture.

release-owner-approval.evidence: No final release-owner approval for store submission is recorded.

public-urls.evidence: Support URL https://szechunyiu.github.io/Swedish_Civic_Test-public-site/support/, Privacy Policy URL https://szechunyiu.github.io/Swedish_Civic_Test-public-site/privacy/, and app-ads.txt URL https://szechunyiu.github.io/Swedish_Civic_Test-public-site/app-ads.txt are hosted as the SzeChunYiu GitHub Pages public-site bundle. Support/privacy returned HTTP 200 on 2026-05-16; app-ads.txt was published to public-site commit d68694f95618abe3097ae4c6e4c14bee6115a24a and returned HTTP 200 on 2026-05-19 with exact seller line google.com, pub-2451892671779738, DIRECT, f08c47fec0942fa0. Support/privacy still need to be entered in the Apple/Google store records.

device-screenshots.evidence: Web-draft screenshots and manifest exist, but final device/store screenshots are not recorded.

submission.evidence: No TestFlight, Google Play internal test, production submission, or post-launch monitoring evidence is recorded.
